name: claude-multi-teams
description: Spawn and drive sibling AI CLI agents (claude / codex / agy) in long-lived tmux or cmux panes. Provides the `cmt` CLI with 12 foundation primitives (spawn, ask, kill, status, wait-*, capture, etc.) plus 3 actor-model extensions (enqueue, dequeue, inbox) for deadlock-proof P2P and consensus flows. Works in both real tmux and cmux claude-teams.
